prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 5.4L (327ci) Chevrolet L77 V8 (engine code: L77) with a fully forged internals build using a Scat Enterprises 4340 forged crankshaft (3.75" stroke), Eagle Specialty Products H-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and JE Pistons forged slugs (12.5:1 compression ratio, 4.030" bore). Pair with a custom-grind Comp Cams hydraulic roller camshaft (242°/248° duration @ 0.050", 0.600"/0.610" lift) and port-matched Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.02"/1.60" valves, 200cc intake runners).

Induction: Replace the factory Rochester Quadrajet carburetor with a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body system (92mm bore, 1,200 CFM) on a custom-fabricated aluminum intake manifold (modeled after the Edelbrock Victor Jr. but optimized for the L77’s deck height). Add a K&N Cold Air Intake (short-ram design, 3.5" diameter) with a custom heat shield to isolate from the exhaust manifolds.

Exhaust: Fabricate a 3" diameter stainless steel exhaust system using MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers (straight-through design) and custom 4-into-1 headers (1.75" primary tubes, 3.5" collectors) with ceramic coating from Jet-Hot. Retain the original HK Monaro’s dual-exit rear valance but modify the tips to 4.5" rolled-edge outlets for aggressive tone.
estetica: Body: Install a custom widebody conversion kit from Rare Spares (HK Monaro-specific, bolt-on fender flares with 2.5" additional width per side) paired with a carbon fiber front splitter from Seibon (HK-specific, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes). Add a custom rear diffuser (fabricated from 3mm aluminum, integrated with the Rare Spares rear bumper) and a functional hood scoop (Rocket Bunny-style, 4" rise, carbon fiber).

Wheels: Fit 18x9.5" front and 18x11" rear ET45 offset wheels from Rotiform (LAS-R model, 5x4.75" bolt pattern) wrapped in Nitto NT05 tires (255/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear). Use custom hub-centric spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) to achieve flush fitment without fender rolling.

Interior: Replace the factory bench seats with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (HK Monaro-specific mounting brackets, retaining original seatbelt anchor points) and a custom roll cage from Autopower (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in design with gusseted main hoop). Add a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (14" diameter, quick-release hub) and a custom gauge pod (fabricated from aluminum, housing a Defi Advance BF series boost/fuel pressure gauge and a Stack ST8000 tachometer).
